ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine batch */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine (e.g., red, white) */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for white wine (1 for white, 0 for red) */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the wine (Good or Bad) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Numeric quality rating of the wine */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vineyard where the grapes were sourced */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year of the grape harvest */,
  "bottle_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was bottled */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle (e.g., 750ml, 1.5L) */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the production process */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wine is stored */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Tasting notes and comments from quality control experts */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the wine bottle or label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_quality FOREIGN KEY ("quality") REFERENCES quality_ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES wine_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Type of grape used (e.g., Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine is produced */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the vineyard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality rating (e.g., Good, Bad) */,
  "numeric_rating" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the quality rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wine batch */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine batch was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the production batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_volume" REAL /* Volume of the production batch in liters */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "batch_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the production batch */,
  "quality_certification" TEXT /* Quality certification (e.g., ISO, HACCP) */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control test */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of quality control test (e.g., chemical, sensory) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "test_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the test */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_tests_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)
